info.name:
Gets all of the grows devices, including latest data.
Sparklines (data for the last hour) are not included

items.docs:
Gets all of the grows devices, including latest data.
Sparklines (data for the last hour) are not included

params.name: deviceId
params.description: The device identifier for which to retrieve the latest data.

items.docs: Gets the last data point for a device

info.name: Data Range for Device. Each Datapoint in range will be counted towards your api usage limit.

params.name: deviceId
params.description: The device identifier for which to retrieve data.

params.name: start
params.description: The beginning time of your data range in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: end
params.description: The end time of your data range in ISO 8601 format. If not provided, API will use the current time.

items.docs: Retrieves all datapoints within a specified timespan the device.
Retrieves all of the device ids assigned to the grow.
Retrieves detailed information for all devices on the grow.

info.name: Data Range for All Devices. Each Datapoint will be counted towards your api usage limit.

params.name: start
params.description: The beginning time of your data range in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: end
params.description: The end time of your data range in ISO 8601 format. If not provided, API will use the current time.

items.docs: Retrieves all datapoints within a specified timespan for all devices on grow. Max data range of 7 days.
Retrieves all of the hubs ids assigned to the grow.

info.name: List of invitations that have been sent, but not yet been accepted or canceled.

items.docs: List of invitations that have been sent, but not yet been accepted or canceled.

info.name: Retrieves (one page worth of) light readings(including spectrum) for a given device, supports pagination.

params.name: page
params.description: Object containing requested page position. Note that page numeration starts from zero

items.docs: Retrieves (one page worth of) light readings(including spectrum) for a given device, supports pagination.

info.name:
Remotely triggers a light reading off of a Pulse Pro.
The Result needs to be fetched separately in 5-10 seconds
There is a small chance of the Pro failing to trigger a light reading remotely
If no new data is found - retrigger in 1 minute

items.docs:
Remotely triggers a light reading off of a Pulse Pro.
The Result needs to be fetched separately in 5-10 seconds
There is a small chance of the Pro failing to trigger a light reading remotely
If no new data is found - retrigger in 1 minute

params.name: sensorId
params.description: The sensor identifier for which to retrieve the latest data.

items.docs: Gets the last data point for a sensor

info.name: Data Range for Sensor. Each Datapoint in range will be counted towards your api usage limit.

params.name: sensorId
params.description: The sensor identifier for which to retrieve data.

params.name: start
params.description: The beginning time of your data range in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: end
params.description: The end time of your data range in ISO 8601 format. If not provided, API will use the current time.

items.docs: Retrieves all datapoints within a specified timespan the sensor.
Retrieves all of the sensor ids assigned to the grow.

info.name:
Retrieves timeline events for grow. 
Supports pagination by page and number of retrieved events.
Supports filtering by range and event types.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Starting day of event selection. 30 days prior will be used as starting date if not provided

params.name: endDate
params.description: Last day day of event selection. 30 days after today will be used as starting date if not provided

items.docs:
Retrieves timeline events for grow. 
Supports pagination by page and number of retrieved events.
Supports filtering by range and event types.

info.name: Retrieves triggered thresholds for a grow

items.docs: Retrieves triggered thresholds for a grow

info.name: List of users and their data for api key

items.docs: Retrieves all users for the grow that is bound the the api key.
